headline: Is Masco (MAS) Pricing Reflect Longer Term Gains Or Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Masco's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this article will walk through what the numbers actually say rather than just the market mood. Masco's share price last closed at US$69.80, with returns of 5.6% over the last 30 days and 8.3% year to date, set against a 3.8% decline over the past year and a 41.8% gain over three years. Recent market attention on Masco has focused on how its long term share performance of 41.8% over three years...
